docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT EMAN MAGHRBI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JACK SHIH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGHRBI, EMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHIH, JACK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SHIH, JACK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MAGHRBI, EMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEE $80. SERVED FEB-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAGHRBI, EMAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED JAN-31-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH, JACK
